programs.title: Danger Decoded
programs.desc: A mountain expedition doesn't go as planned  a powerboat race with a horrific outcome  a downhill cycling speed racing event, which races towards catastrophe.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: The Westpac Rescue Crew help a skydiver whose parachute has failed, and a ten-year-old who is thrown off his motorbike.

programs.title: Air Rescue
programs.desc: The Westpac Rescue Crew help a girl who is suffering a suspected spinal injury from surfing, and winch a German tourist to safety from the edge of a cliff.

programs.title: Chopper Squad
programs.desc: An elite helicopter team of pilots and paramedics save lives in Auckland, New Zealand.

programs.title: Chopper Squad
programs.desc: An elite helicopter team of pilots and paramedics save lives in Auckland, New Zealand.

programs.title: Coast Guard Cape Disappointment: Pacific Northwest: High and Dry
programs.desc: Station Cape Disappointment steps into action when a sailor is left high and dry  Air Station Astoria takes to the coast when the tides close in on a surfer, trapped in a cove.
